div.p: Leader-side arrays tracking follower replication progress
becomeLeader() initialization: go lastLogIndex := len(log) - 1 // Optimistic: assume followers are up-to-date nextIndex[i] = lastLogIndex + 1 // Pessimistic: we know nothing yet matchIndex[i] = 0

ul.li: matchIndex: What we know is replicated (pessimistic)

div.p: AppendEntries(prevLogIndex=10, prevLogTerm=3) Response: Success=false ConflictTerm=2 ConflictIndex=5

tr.td: Init: lastLog+1; Decr: rejection; Incr: success
